heading: Authority to use appropriated funds for transportation and reimbursement of certain items
label: 3075 Authority to use appropriated funds for transportation and reimbursement of certain items
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 874 of this titlePub. L. 107–372

children.heading: Transportation of effects of deceased officers
children.label: a Transportation of effects of deceased officers
children.text: In the case of an officer who dies on active duty, the Secretary may provide, from appropriations made available to the Administration, transportation (including packing, unpacking, crating, and uncrating) of personal and household effects of that officer to the official residence of record of that officer. However, upon application by the dependents of such an officer, such transportation may be provided to such other location as may be determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Reimbursement for supplies furnished by officers to distressed and shipwrecked persons
children.label: b Reimbursement for supplies furnished by officers to distressed and shipwrecked persons

children.text: for the temporary relief of distressed persons in remote localities; or
to shipwrecked persons who are temporarily provided for by the officer.
